name: Shipyard Sports & Events Center
about: Shipyard Sports & Events Center is a 67,000 sq. ft. multi-sport facility in Celina, Ohio, that offers golf simulator bays for rent by the hour. The venue features hardwood courts, sport courts, and a full-size turf field, hosting a dozen games simultaneously alongside its golf offerings. It caters to both youth and adult athletes with a focus on practice, leagues, and events, providing a comprehensive sports complex experience with integrated food and beverage options.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient hourly rental model for flexible practice sessions
Integrated food and drink options at the on-site Sub Shack
Multi-sport facility atmosphere appeals to non-golfers in groups
Located within a larger complex with event and party hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site Sub Shack offers subs, salads, and wraps
Cold beer available at Sub Shack

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs when booking a golf simulator session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies aren't specified, but the venue has an on-site Sub Shack offering subs, salads, wraps, and cold beer for purchase.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't provide specific timing for simulator rounds, so duration would depend on the number of players and pace of play per bay.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Shipyard Sports & Events Center is family-friendly, offering sports programs, birthday party packages, and a welcoming atmosphere for youth activities.
